title: Crunchy Russian Savory Leaves Stir-fry
description: A fresh and crunchy savory dish featuring dried summer savoury leaves that are perfect for hangover cures, made with a pescatarian-friendly twist using the pressure cooker method.
instructions: Place the dried Summer Savory Leaves in a bowl and pour hot water over them to rehydrate. Let sit for about 5 minutes.
In a pan heated with extra virgin olive oil, sauté minced garlic and finely chopped shallots until fragrant.
Add the rehydrated Summer Savory Leaves and diced red or green peppers (if using). Stir well and let cook for an additional minute.
Season to taste with salt and freshly ground black pepper. Serve immediately as a snack.
